title: oreogrammitis subevenosa
intro: Oreogrammitis subevenosa, also known as subeven fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis subevenosa include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
